Quote for
Help & Walkthroughs
Walkthroughs
Create your first quote
A quick overview of the key areas to get your first quote out the door.
Setting up your profile
Add your business name, logo, ABN and T&Cs so they appear on every quote.
Understanding markup
Learn how cost-plus markup works and how to set your rates and margins.
Quick tips
Use the discount field on any line group to apply a % off — the PDF column auto-hides if nothing is discounted.
Drag the sidebar divider to resize the quote editor and PDF preview side by side.
The totals bar shows your live margin. Green = healthy, aim for 30%+.
Send quotes directly from ProQuote — clients get a PDF with your branding and T&Cs merged in.
Switch to Mobile mode (phone icon in nav) for a cleaner layout on tablets and phones.
ProQuote
👋 Welcome to ProQuote! Take a 2-minute tour to get started.
